news.t: YieldMax® ETFs Announces Weekly Distributions for Group 2 ETFs
YieldMax® Introduces Option Income Strategy ETF on Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (BRK.B)

holdings.infoBox: BRKC is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 0% stock at 69.18%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 22.90%, OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 5.37%, Brkb 07/17/2026 490.01 C at 4.19%, and Cash Offset at 3.64%.

overview.description: The YieldMax BRK.B Option Income Strategy ETF (BRKC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B) stock through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. BRKC was launched on Jun 4, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
